disclaimer: This mapping is local engineering evidence for DevPilot governance. It is not a certification, legal opinion, external audit, or compliance guarantee.
scope: Initial internal control mapping for local-first SDLC governance, security, tests, release evidence and observability.

controls.title: Remote execution remains disabled by default
controls.description: Remote runner and arbitrary remote execution stay blocked unless a future ADR and explicit gates approve them.

controls.title: Plugin execution is blocked until future ADR
controls.description: Plugin manifests, permission model and dry-run reports must not enable plugin code execution.

controls.title: Policy, Approval and RBAC checks protect sensitive actions
controls.description: Sensitive operations require policy evaluation, scoped approval and RBAC evidence.

controls.title: Test contracts and quality gates remain traceable
controls.description: Critical capabilities must have test contract registry coverage and quality-gate evidence.

controls.title: Release reproducibility evidence is local and secret-free
controls.description: Release reproducibility packs must remain local, dry-run safe and secret-free.

controls.title: Observability retention is governed locally
controls.description: Observability evidence must use local retention, hygiene and redaction policies.

controls.title: Documentation governance prevents source-of-truth drift
controls.description: Canonical documents and machine-readable registries must stay synchronized.
